sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n86390" key="prismatokau/sths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πρισ-μᾰτοκαύστης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n86390.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">slowburning fire of sawdust,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ps.-Democr.</author> </bibl>Alch.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1306.tlg001:p.52B" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.52B.</biblScope> </bibl>:—<orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πρισ-μᾰτόκαυστος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">forming such a fire,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἄνθρακες</foreign> Zos.Alch.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1306.tlg001:p.143B" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.143B.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
